# Vision Statement: [Product Name]

## Product Vision
<!-- One paragraph. What is this product and why does it exist? -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What specific problem(s) does this product solve? Be concrete. -->

## Target Audience
<!-- Who are the primary users? Be specific — not "everyone" or "developers". -->

| Audience Segment | Description | Primary Need |
|-----------------|-------------|--------------|
| | | |

## Value Proposition
<!-- Why would the target audience use this instead of what they use today? -->

## Success Criteria
<!-- How will we know this product is successful? Measurable where possible. -->

| Criterion | Metric | Target |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| | | |

## Scope: What This Product IS
<!-- Bulleted list of what the product does. Be explicit. -->

## Scope: What This Product IS NOT
<!-- Equally important. What are we explicitly NOT building? -->

## Key Assumptions
<!-- What must be true for this product to succeed? -->

## Open Questions
<!-- Anything unresolved that needs further investigation. -->

| # | Question | Status | Resolution |
|---|----------|--------|------------|
| | | open / resolved | |
